+    @MainActor
+    func testStopRecordingCancelsScreenContextPrefetchAfterCompletion() async {
+        let settings = makeSettings()
+        settings.frontmostWindowContextEnabled = true
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let cleanupModelManager = AppControllerCleanupModelManager()
+        cleanupModelManager.phase = .ready
+        cleanupModelManager.loadedModelID = settings.selectedCleanupModelKind
+        let recorder = AppControllerAudioRecorder()
+        recorder.samplesToReturn = [0.2, -0.1, 0.4]
+        let transcriber = AppControllerSpeechTranscriber()
+        transcriber.result = "transcribed text"
+        let cleanupPipeline = AppControllerCleanupPipeline()
+        cleanupPipeline.result = CleanupResult(
+            text: "corrected text",
+            usedFallback: false,
+            modelDuration: 0.2,
+            postProcessDuration: 0.1,
+            diagnosticTranscript: nil
+        )
+        let pasteDeliverer = AppControllerTextPasteDeliverer()
+        let prefetcher = AppControllerScreenContextPrefetcher()
+        prefetcher.resolveResult = ScreenContextPrefetchResult(
+            context: "Xcode Build Settings",
+            elapsed: 0.42
+        )
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            cleanupModelManager: cleanupModelManager,
+            audioRecorder: recorder,
+            speechTranscriber: transcriber,
+            cleanupPipeline: cleanupPipeline,
+            textPasteDeliverer: pasteDeliverer,
+            screenContextPrefetcher: prefetcher
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.start(.pushToTalk))
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.stop)
+        await waitUntil {
+            controller.status == .ready && pasteDeliverer.deliveredTexts == ["corrected text"]
+        }
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(prefetcher.cancelCallCount, 1)
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testStopRecordingWritesPerformanceTraceToDebugLogStore() async throws {
+        let settings = makeSettings()
+        let logURL = makeTemporaryLogURL()
+        let debugLogStore = DebugLogStore(url: logURL)
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let recorder = AppControllerAudioRecorder()
+        recorder.samplesToReturn = [0.2, -0.1, 0.4]
+        let transcriber = AppControllerSpeechTranscriber()
+        transcriber.result = "transcribed text"
+        let pasteDeliverer = AppControllerTextPasteDeliverer()
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            audioRecorder: recorder,
+            speechTranscriber: transcriber,
+            textPasteDeliverer: pasteDeliverer,
+            debugLogStore: debugLogStore
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.start(.pushToTalk))
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.stop)
+        await waitUntil {
+            controller.status == .ready && pasteDeliverer.deliveredTexts == ["transcribed text"]
+        }
+
+        let message = try XCTUnwrap(
+            debugLogStore.entries.last(where: { $0.category == .performance })?.message
+        )
+        XCTAssertTrue(message.contains("speechModel=\(SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)"))
+        XCTAssertTrue(message.contains("cleanupBackend=\(settings.cleanupBackend)"))
+        XCTAssertTrue(message.contains("total="))
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testStopRecordingCapturesCleanupSnapshotOnlyWhileViewerIsOpen() async throws {
+        let settings = makeSettings()
+        settings.frontmostWindowContextEnabled = true
+        let logURL = makeTemporaryLogURL()
+        let debugLogStore = DebugLogStore(url: logURL)
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let cleanupModelManager = AppControllerCleanupModelManager()
+        cleanupModelManager.phase = .ready
+        cleanupModelManager.loadedModelID = settings.selectedCleanupModelKind
+        let recorder = AppControllerAudioRecorder()
+        recorder.samplesToReturn = [0.2, -0.1, 0.4]
+        let transcriber = AppControllerSpeechTranscriber()
+        transcriber.result = "raw transcript"
+        let cleanupPipeline = AppControllerCleanupPipeline()
+        cleanupPipeline.result = CleanupResult(
+            text: "cleaned transcript",
+            usedFallback: false,
+            promptBuildDuration: 0.03,
+            modelDuration: 0.2,
+            postProcessDuration: 0.1,
+            diagnosticTranscript: CleanupDiagnosticTranscript(
+                systemPrompt: "System prompt",
+                framedInput: "<USER-INPUT>raw transcript</USER-INPUT>",
+                rawModelOutput: "Model output"
+            )
+        )
+        let pasteDeliverer = AppControllerTextPasteDeliverer()
+        let prefetcher = AppControllerScreenContextPrefetcher()
+        prefetcher.resolveResult = ScreenContextPrefetchResult(
+            context: "Xcode Build Settings",
+            elapsed: 0.42
+        )
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            cleanupModelManager: cleanupModelManager,
+            audioRecorder: recorder,
+            speechTranscriber: transcriber,
+            cleanupPipeline: cleanupPipeline,
+            textPasteDeliverer: pasteDeliverer,
+            screenContextPrefetcher: prefetcher,
+            debugLogStore: debugLogStore
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.start(.pushToTalk))
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.stop)
+        await waitUntil {
+            controller.status == .ready && pasteDeliverer.deliveredTexts == ["cleaned transcript"]
+        }
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(debugLogStore.entries.filter { $0.category == .cleanup }, [])
+
+        debugLogStore.beginLiveViewing()
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.start(.pushToTalk))
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.stop)
+        await waitUntil {
+            controller.status == .ready && pasteDeliverer.deliveredTexts.count == 2
+        }
+        debugLogStore.endLiveViewing()
+
+        let cleanupMessage = try XCTUnwrap(
+            debugLogStore.entries.last(where: { $0.category == .cleanup })?.message
+        )
+        XCTAssertTrue(cleanupMessage.contains("raw_transcription=raw transcript"))
+        XCTAssertTrue(cleanupMessage.contains("cleanup_backend=\(settings.cleanupBackend)"))
+        XCTAssertTrue(cleanupMessage.contains("window_context=Xcode Build Settings"))
+        XCTAssertTrue(cleanupMessage.contains("system_prompt=System prompt"))
+        XCTAssertTrue(cleanupMessage.contains("framed_input=<USER-INPUT>raw transcript</USER-INPUT>"))
+        XCTAssertTrue(cleanupMessage.contains("raw_model_output=Model output"))
+        XCTAssertTrue(cleanupMessage.contains("final_output=cleaned transcript"))
+    }
+

+    private func makeTemporaryLogURL() -> URL {
+        let directoryURL = FileManager.default.temporaryDirectory
+            .appending(path: UUID().uuidString, directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+        try? FileManager.default.createDirectory(at: directoryURL, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
+        addTeardownBlock {
+            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: directoryURL)
+        }
+        return directoryURL.appending(path: "debug-log.json", directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+    }
 }

+    func testDebugLogStoreTracksViewerCountAndGatesSensitiveEntries() throws {
+        let logURL = makeTemporaryFileURL()
+        let store = DebugLogStore(url: logURL)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.liveViewerCount, 0)
+
+        store.recordSensitive(category: .cleanup, message: "secret")
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.entries, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.loadEntries(), [])
+
+        store.beginLiveViewing()
+        store.beginLiveViewing()
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.liveViewerCount, 2)
+
+        store.recordSensitive(category: .cleanup, message: "secret")
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.entries.map(\.message), ["secret"])
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.loadEntries().map(\.message), ["secret"])
+
+        store.endLiveViewing()
+        store.endLiveViewing()
+        store.endLiveViewing()
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.liveViewerCount, 0)
+    }
+
+    func testDebugLogStoreFormatsEntriesAndClearsPersistedState() throws {
+        let logURL = makeTemporaryFileURL()
+        let store = DebugLogStore(url: logURL)
+        let originalTimeZone = NSTimeZone.default
+        NSTimeZone.default = TimeZone(secondsFromGMT: 0)!
+        addTeardownBlock {
+            NSTimeZone.default = originalTimeZone
+        }
+
+        try store.append(
+            category: .hotkey,
+            message: "Started recording",
+            timestamp: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 32_707),
+            id: UUID(uuidString: "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001")!
+        )
+        try store.append(
+            category: .performance,
+            message: "session=abc total=50ms",
+            timestamp: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 32_708),
+            id: UUID(uuidString: "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002")!
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            store.formattedEntries,
+            "[09:05:07] [Hotkey] Started recording\n\n[09:05:08] [Performance] session=abc total=50ms"
+        )
+
+        store.clear()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.entries, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.formattedEntries, "")
+        let payload = try XCTUnwrap(JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: Data(contentsOf: logURL)) as? [Any])
+        XCTAssertEqual(payload.count, 0)
+    }
+

         let debugLog = AppSupportPaths.debugLogURL()

         XCTAssertTrue(panel.isFloatingPanel)

         XCTAssertFalse(panel.isReleasedWhenClosed)

+        manager.show()
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.liveViewerCount, 1)
+
         XCTAssertFalse(manager.windowShouldClose(panel))
         XCTAssertFalse(panel.isVisible)
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.liveViewerCount, 0)
 
         manager.show()
 
         XCTAssertTrue(manager.currentWindow === panel)
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.liveViewerCount, 1)
     }

+    func testTraceUsesSkippedCleanupFieldsAndFallbackPasteTimestampWhenCompletingWithoutDelivery() {
+        let logger = RecordingPerformanceTraceLogger()
+        let builder = LiveDictationSessionTraceBuilder(
+            dateProvider: SequencedDateProvider(dates: [
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0.0),
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0.05),
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0.2),
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0.4),
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0.45),
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0.95),
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1.0),
+            ]),
+            logger: logger,
+            speechModelIDProvider: { "openai_whisper-small.en" },
+            cleanupBackendProvider: { "localModels" }
+        )
+
+        let trace = builder.makeTrace()
+        trace.markMicrophoneLive()
+        trace.markHotkeyLifted()
+        trace.markMicrophoneCold()
+        trace.markTranscriptionStart()
+        trace.markTranscriptionEnd()
+        trace.completeWithoutDelivery()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            logger.messages,
+            [
+                "session=trace-session-1 speechModel=openai_whisper-small.en cleanupBackend=localModels hotkey_to_mic_live=50ms hotkey_lift_to_mic_cold=200ms transcription=500ms cleanup=skipped ocr=skipped prompt_build=skipped model_call=skipped post_process=skipped paste=n/a total=1000ms"
+            ]
+        )
+    }
 }
 
 private final class SequencedDateProvider: DateProviding {
@@ -90,6 +139,11 @@ private final class RecordingPerformanceTraceLogger: PerformanceTraceLogging {
     private(set) var messages: [String] = []
 
     func logPerformance(_ message: String) {
-        messages.append(message)
+        let rewrittenMessage = message.replacingOccurrences(
+            of: #"session=([0-9a-fA-F\-]+)"#,
+            with: "session=trace-session-1",
+            options: .regularExpression
+        )
+        messages.append(rewrittenMessage)
     }
 }

+    @MainActor
+    func testSuccessfulLoadLogsModelReadyEvent() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        var loggedModelIDs: [String] = []
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader,
+            loadSuccessLogger: { loggedModelIDs.append($0) }
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(loggedModelIDs, [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testTimedOutLoadLogsRetryEvent() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        loader.loadErrorSequence = [URLError(.timedOut)]
+        var retriedModelIDs: [String] = []
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader,
+            loadRetryLogger: { retriedModelIDs.append($0) }
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(retriedModelIDs, [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testFailedLoadLogsModelFailureDescription() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        loader.loadErrorSequence = [NSError(
+            domain: "SpeechModelManagerTests",
+            code: 42,
+            userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Model load failed."]
+        )]
+        var failures: [(String, String)] = []
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader,
+            loadFailureLogger: { modelID, description in
+                failures.append((modelID, description))
+            }
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(failures.count, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(failures.first?.0, SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+        XCTAssertEqual(failures.first?.1, "Model load failed.")
+    }
+
     @MainActor
     func testUnknownModelTransitionsToErrorWithoutCallingLoader() async {
         let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()

@@ -190,3 +190,13 @@
 - Replaced the placeholder History section with the full browser/detail experience, including saved-recording rows, playback and copy actions, rerun transcription and cleanup controls, inline prompt editing, cleanup transcript window handoff, text diff rendering, and diarization visualization.
 - Hardened archive reload behavior and store failure recovery while expanding focused coverage for history controller flows, diff semantics, diarization visualization state, and playback/copy actions.
 **Summary:** Delivered the transcription-lab slice on top of archived recording history. Ghost Pepper now reloads saved recordings into Settings > History, opens a detail view for each archived session, replays playable WAV audio, reruns transcription and cleanup under the same pipeline mutex as live recording, compares experiment timings and diffs against the archived results, exposes the full cleanup transcript in a separate window, and visualizes diarization metadata plus fallback reasons for speaker-filtered recordings. No stories moved forward during wrap-up; the only artifact cleanup was correcting earlier premature history/lab completion markers before closing the implementation in place.
+
+## ITER-0019
+
+**Completed:** 2026-04-10
+**Stories delivered:** STORY-0349, STORY-0350, STORY-0351, STORY-0352, STORY-0353, STORY-0354, STORY-0355, STORY-0356, STORY-0357, STORY-0358, STORY-0359, STORY-0360, STORY-0361, STORY-0362, STORY-0363, STORY-0364, STORY-0365, STORY-0366, STORY-0367, STORY-0368, STORY-0369, STORY-0370, STORY-0371, STORY-0372, STORY-0373, STORY-0374, STORY-0375, STORY-0376, STORY-0377, STORY-0378, STORY-0379, STORY-0380, STORY-0381, STORY-0382, STORY-0383, STORY-0384, STORY-0385, STORY-0386, STORY-0536, STORY-0784, STORY-0785, STORY-0786, STORY-0787, STORY-0788, STORY-0789, STORY-0790, STORY-0791, STORY-0792, STORY-0793, STORY-0794, STORY-0795, STORY-0796, STORY-0797, STORY-0798, STORY-0799
+**Tasks executed:**
+- Reworked the debug log runtime around a single observable store with bounded persisted entries, live viewer counting, sensitive-entry gating, shared hotkey and OCR log sinks, and a floating debug utility window with copy, clear, reuse, and bottom-follow behavior.
+- Rebuilt dictation performance tracing so each session stamps the documented milestones and durations, formats a single `key=value` performance summary with speech-model and cleanup-backend metadata, writes that summary into the Performance log, and clears trace state plus pending OCR prefetches on completion or abandonment.
+- Wired live-session cleanup snapshots through the archive path so raw transcription, cleanup configuration, window context, diagnostic prompt/input/output data, and final text are captured only while the debug viewer is open, while also adding model-category success, retry, failure, and empty-transcription logging.
+**Summary:** Delivered the diagnostics and performance-tracing slice on top of the complete runtime and transcription lab. Ghost Pepper now keeps a live, persisted debug log with viewer-gated sensitive entries, exposes the log in a reusable floating viewer, records full dictation performance traces with the documented session metrics, writes those traces to the Performance category, logs speech-model lifecycle failures under the Model category, and captures cleanup snapshots only while a debug viewer is actively open. No follow-up scope moved out of the iteration during wrap-up because the remaining viewer and trace contracts were closed in place.
